basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (https://igrua.gov.in). A total of 3 Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) vacancies have been announced through the IGRUA Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 01 July 2026. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Valid & Current Commercial Pilot License (CPL) issued by DGCA, Should be recent on DA-40, Valid Class-I Medical Certificate, Valid Flight Radio Telephony Operator’s License (FRTOL/RTR), Valid English Language Proficiency (ELP) as per DGCA requirements, Satisfactory Training Record & Conduct during CPL Training
qualification.details: Valid & Current Commercial Pilot License (CPL) issued by DGCA Should be recent on DA-40 Valid Class-I Medical Certificate Valid Flight Radio Telephony Operator’s License (FRTOL/RTR) Valid English Language Proficiency (ELP) as per DGCA requirements Satisfactory Training Record & Conduct during CPL Training

selection_process: Selection process as per approved policy published on IGRUA website
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IGRUA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IGRUA Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA U/T-AFI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 28th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Valid & Current Commercial Pilot License (CPL) issued by DGCA, be recent on DA-40, hold a Valid Class-I Medical Certificate, a Valid Flight Radio Telephony Operator’s License (FRTOL/RTR), and a Valid English Language Proficiency (ELP).

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years as of 01 July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the IGRUA U/T-AFI posts?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application with all required documents to the official email address provided.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Under Trainee Assistant Flight Instructor (U/T-AFI) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.

faq.question: Q9. How will candidates be selected for the U/T-AFI role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be conducted as per the approved policy published on the IGRUA website. Specific details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and apply through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also listed there.
